title: शक्ति का प्रत्यायोजन सम्बंधी राजपत्र अधिसूचना / Gazette Notification on Delegation of powers
full_text:
# [Attachment: शक्ति का प्रत्यायोजन सम्बंधी राजपत्र अधिसूचना _ Gazette Notification on Delegation of powers.pdf] रजिसरी सं. डी.एल.- 33004/99 REGD. No. D. L.-33004/99 सी.जी.-टी.एल.-अ.-17042026-271877 **xxxGIDHxxx CG-TL-E-17042026-271877 xxxGIDExxx** असाधारण **EXTRAORDINARY** भाग **III** — खण ड **4 PART III—Section 4** पाजधकार स पकाजित **PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY** सं. **270]** िई कदलली, बृहस पजतिार, अपैल **16, 2026/** चैत **26, 1948 No. 270] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, APRIL 16, 2026/CHAITRA 26, 1948** # भारतीय बीमा जिजियामक और जिकास पाजधकरण # अजधसूचिा हैदराबाद , 15 अप्रैल , 2026 फा. सं. आईआरडीएआई/4/218/2026.– बीमा जिजियामक और जिकास प्राजधकरण अजधजियम, 1999 (1999 का 41) की धारा 23 की उप-धारा (1) द्वारा प्रदत्त िजियों का प्रयोग करते हुए, प्राजधकरण िे 30.03.2026 को आयोजित 135िीं बैठक में बीमा अजधजियम, 1938 की धारा 34 के अधीि अपिी िजि का प्रत्यायोिि ककया है। प्राजधकरण द्वारा यथाअिुमोकदत िजियों का उि प्रत्यायोिि जिम्नािुसार ह |**धारा स.**|**शकि का सरप**|**शकि का पतायोजन ननमिकित**
**को नकया गया**| |---|---|---| |बीमा
अधिधियम,
1938 की िारा|अधिधििाररत उलघि क धिए धकसी पवति कायवाही म धकसी
बीमाकता क अथवा, धवशष रप स बीमा मधवती क धिदश का
धिरम|अधक क दारा रधित द (2)
परकाधिक सदस का पिि| |34|बीमा अधिधियम, 1938 की िारा 34 क अिीि, धकसी अन धवषय म
धिदश का धिरम|अधक| िे. मीिा कुमारी, काययकारी जिदेिक [जिज्ञापि-III/4/असा./39/2026-27] 2731 GI/2026 (1) 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC.4] ### **INSURANCE REGULATORY AND DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY OF INDIA** ## **NOTIFICATION** Hyderabad, the 15th April, 2026 **F. No IRDAI /DoP/4/218/2026. -** In exercise of the powers conferred by sub section (1) of section 23 of the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 1999 (41 of 1999), the Authority in the 135th meeting held on 30.03.2026 has delegated its power under Section 34 of Insurance Act 1938. The delegation of powers as approved by the Authority are as under: |**Section No.**|**Nature of Power**|**Power delegated to**| |---|---|---| |Section 34 of
the
Insurance
Act, 1938|Issuance of directions to any insurer or insurance
intermediary
in
particular,
in
an
enforcement
proceedingfor identified violations.|Panel of two (2) Whole Time Members,
constituted by the Chairperson| ||Issuance of direction on any other matter under Section
34 of the Insurance Act, 1938.|Chairperson| J. MEENA KUMARI, Executive Director [ADVT.-III/4/Exty./39/2026-27] Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. chunks.heading: **NOTIFICATION**
chunks.attachment: शक्ति का प्रत्यायोजन सम्बंधी राजपत्र अधिसूचना _ Gazette Notification on Delegation of powers.pdf
chunks.content:
Hyderabad, the 15th April, 2026 **F. No IRDAI /DoP/4/218/2026. -** In exercise of the powers conferred by sub section (1) of section 23 of the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 1999 (41 of 1999), the Authority in the 135th meeting held on 30.03.2026 has delegated its power under Section 34 of Insurance Act 1938. The delegation of powers as approved by the Authority are as under: |**Section No.**|**Nature of Power**|**Power delegated to**| |---|---|---| |Section 34 of
the
Insurance
Act, 1938|Issuance of directions to any insurer or insurance
intermediary
in
particular,
in
an
enforcement
proceedingfor identified violations.|Panel of two (2) Whole Time Members,
constituted by the Chairperson| ||Issuance of direction on any other matter under Section
34 of the Insurance Act, 1938.|Chairperson| J. MEENA KUMARI, Executive Director [ADVT.-III/4/Exty./39/2026-27] Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. SARVESH KUMAR SRIVASTAVA Digitally signed by SARVESH KUMAR SRIVASTAVA Date: 2026.04.17 21:10:15 +05'30'
